description: Perform hierarchical (agglomerative) clustering on the Big Five Personality Traits dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv) in JASP to identify 3 personality clusters. Use Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Neuroticism, and Openness as features with Ward.D2 linkage and Euclidean distance. The output must include a cluster means table, a dendrogram plot, and the cluster assignments added to the dataset. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/HierarchicalClustering_BigFive.jasp.
